summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProbabilityOS Phase 1 MVP - a prediction market intelligence terminal. All core features are working correctly including live data fetching, navigation, market display, shock detection, and chart visualization.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height (-1) when rendering
ui_bugs.impact: Visual console warnings only, chart functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Market table with all required columns
Shock Detector page with z-score analysis
Shock alert cards with proper color coding
Longshot bias warnings for low probability markets
High optimism bias warnings for appropriate categories
Chart page navigation from market clicks
Price chart with volume bars and moving average
Data Insights Panel with Calibration Score, Smart Money Gap, YES/NO Asymmetry

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all features working with minor chart rendering warnings)
